feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Can I create Adaptation Project from my custom Fiori element (Analytic List Report Template) ?
entry.content:
Hi,
 I have created my new custom Fiori Element Application that uses Analytic List Report Template
My new custom application is deployed on SAP S/4 Hana Public Cloud Edition
Then, I try to use BAS to create a new Adaptation Project to extend my custom Fiori Element app
but I cannot find my custom Fiori Element App on the list to select
Is there anything I need to configure my app before making it in a project type of cloudReady?
or make it available on the selection list

Thank you,
Pakorn

entry.title: Sales return orders automatically generate delivery note
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I would like to know if there is any scheduling APP that can automatically generate a delivery note if a return sales order is required in the app?

Thank you~

entry.title: Custom approval workflow required for timesheet entries in SAP public cloud
entry.content:
Hi HCM experts,

Employee master is directly being integrated through  3rd party ADP, for timesheet approval they have custom approval logic which they want to implement. 

e.g for senior operator approval should go through their manager and then through HR.

Is it possible to implement such a logic for different data profiles in SAP cloud

entry.title: How can I read peoject and WBS balance?
entry.content:
Hi All,

We want to find our project and WBS amounts. Which CDS keep this information? or which API can give it?

Thank you for your help 

Regards

entry.title: Payment reference
entry.content:
Hello,

when trying to post a AR document I receive the following error message. Our company is in Germany, the vendor we want to post to is in DK.

This is the message we receive: "Payment reference INV1234 is not correct for country Denmark"

Is it possible to change this message or setting?

Regards

Desiree

entry.title: Re: how to find SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition DB size
entry.content: If the systems are connected into C-ALM, you can configure the Health Monitoring function and check the history of the DB size, for each tenant.

entry.title: WBS Element to Control Budgeting(Capex)
entry.content:
Dear SAP Expert,

On ECC 6.0, My client uses internal order for controlling purchase assets(Capex)

Currently, the S/4Hana Public cloud removes the internal order function.

My client requested to control budgeting for purchase Assets (Capex). 

- I use WBS to control the budget, but when I import WBS for budget the system requests input G/L Account.

  Can I import directly to WBS?

- The public cloud support "Overall" planning or not.

Please recommendation.

Thanks,

May

entry.title: Extend Validity of E-Waybill
entry.content:
How to extend the validity of E-Waybill?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Downpayment request from sales order for US not being cleared by incoming payment
entry.content:
We have an issue with DP request for US where the tax calculation happens via taxjar integration and tax code config in SAP has 0%. The DP request created from sales order billing cannot be cleared with incoming payment with the following error message - Tax entry not possible in this item (Message no. FF724). However, the F2 invoice document can be cleared with incoming payment which means all our downpayments for US remains uncleared. This works fine for non-US company code where system is calculating the tax. 

However, if we try to create a manual FI DP request for US with some tax value and clear the same with incoming payment, this works fine. 

The issue happens only when we try to get it integrated with SD with FAZ doc type for DP req and it is not letting us go ahead in clearing the DP request with payment as in any normal std flow.

entry.title: How is the delivery plant determined in a sales order
entry.content:
There is a requirement to know how values for the delivery plant are determined when creating a sales order.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Criteria for copying journal entries
entry.content:
Dear Community,

we have noticed that it is possible to copy some journal entries in app 'Manage Journal Entries', but not others. It is not entirely clear which requirements must be met for a posting document to be copied. We believe that we identified some criteria, for example that reverse documents can not be copied. But we still have some cases where it is not clear to us why copying the document is not possible. 

Can anyone help out with a list of criteria that needs to be met, so that a journal entry can be copied in app 'Manage Journal Entries'?

Thanks in advance!

Regards,
Niklas

entry.title: Batch search using classification not available Production Confirmation
entry.content:
Hi,

Our customer has a need to search batches for components in the production confirmation screen (CO11N). They would like to search the batch by class, using a specific characteristic value.

 

Now although this option is available in the production order, where one can go to the component view, search the batch using a class, we don't see this option in the confirmation screen. See the screenshots below:

Screenshot 1: Search component batch using class in production order

Screenshot 2: Search component batch in CO11N screen

 

We know the work around is to go to BMBC and find the batch. However, is there anything we can do to bring the search via class option in the production confirmation screen? This is strange that search options for batches in production order confirmation screen is different from that of production order.

Thanks

Snigdhodeep

entry.title: 2SL to 3SL conversion question
entry.content:
Hi, 

We are in process of moving from 2SL to 3SL. we have a open question.

 When our current non prod gets converted to Dev with two tenants 80 for development and 100 for customization. Our assumption is 100 will be the tenant which will have data and to be used for unit testing. 

Could you please confirm.

entry.title: Purchasing Info Record number range in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello, 

I can't find a way to maintain the Purchasing Info Record number range in SAP Public Cloud. 

Please, can someone help me on how to do it?

Thank you.

entry.title: Project Processing Status in Project Management SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Can you please advise us how to get the project processing status of an Enterprise project via public API?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: 撤销退货交货单PGI时提示有后续单据
entry.content:
Dear colleague,

客户在做完标准场景2F4加速退货所有流程后，发现单据输错需要冲销重填，客户把开票冲销成功质检后的转非限制库存的物料凭证也冲销了，开始想冲销退货交货单的PGI的时候，遇到了问题提示消息号：MSG_INSP_MESSAGE302,已在交货物料创建了后续凭证无法取消。

那么请问正常流程应该怎么操作，在交货单后面有质检的inspection lot，并且已经完成质检，该状态进入APP也无法修改，那么是不是代表已经无法冲销退货单PGI了，还是说有办法删除inspection lot然后再继续冲销呢？

Many thanks,

Chen

entry.title: Can the client mantain the data of "Output invoice book" Via SAP APP not via IMG ( CBC)?
entry.content:
Hello,  

考量使用者權限設置的安全考量，客戶希望使用者能經由 APP 維護'銷項發票本'資訊，而不是進到IMG去維護，故想請問可以新增一個APP 作業嗎?謝謝!!

entry.title: Question regarding Data Source Integration in Content Form Templates
entry.content:
Is it possible to include data from 'View Browser' and custom CDS Views as data sources in Content Form Templates for displaying on forms/documents?
(It's acceptable to follow the flow: Table Data → Custom Logic → Form Data Source)
If possible, please explain the scope of what can be developed.

I will describe the specific requirements and questions below. 

Requirements:

  • Need to detect and print "Reprinted" on documents when they are reprinted
  • Need to detect and print modified areas on documents when they are changed

 

Question: "In the on-premise SAP system, it's possible to:

  1. Print 'Reprinted' on documents using records from NAST (Output Management Table)
  2. Print modified areas on documents using records from CDHDR (Change Document Header Table)

 

How can we utilize these records for document printing in the SAP Public Cloud version?"

Thank you.

entry.title: Regarding the Schedule End Time in Schedule Delivery Creation
entry.content:
Application: Schedule Delivery Creation
Component: LE-SHP-GF-JS

Requirement: In the Schedule Delivery Creation app, I want to define the job end time
Question: In the Schedule Delivery Creation app, while we can specify the job start time, is it possible to schedule a job with a time range, such as AM09:00~AM11:00?

Note: On the screen, I could only find the parameter for start time.

I am attaching a screenshot of the start time parameter section below.

Thank you.

entry.title: Rf scanning QR codes in warehouse processes
entry.content: Is het possible in public cloud to scan QR codes into the RF menu? And how can we arrange that?
